assertionResults.fullName: getClientIp() reads the platform-trusted x-real-ip header
assertionResults.title: reads the platform-trusted x-real-ip header

assertionResults.fullName: getClientIp() does NOT trust a raw x-forwarded-for header (spoofable) — falls back to loopback
assertionResults.title: does NOT trust a raw x-forwarded-for header (spoofable) — falls back to loopback

assertionResults.fullName: getClientIp() returns 127.0.0.1 when no trusted IP header is present
assertionResults.title: returns 127.0.0.1 when no trusted IP header is present

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) keys an IPv4 address on the full address (a /32, unchanged)
assertionResults.title: keys an IPv4 address on the full address (a /32, unchanged)

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) keys an IPv6 address on its /64 prefix
assertionResults.title: keys an IPv6 address on its /64 prefix

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) two distinct /128s within the SAME /64 share one bucket
assertionResults.title: two distinct /128s within the SAME /64 share one bucket

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) two /128s in DIFFERENT /64s get distinct buckets
assertionResults.title: two /128s in DIFFERENT /64s get distinct buckets

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) expands `::` zero-run compression before taking the /64
assertionResults.title: expands `::` zero-run compression before taking the /64

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) normalises an embedded-IPv4 tail without affecting the /64 prefix
assertionResults.title: normalises an embedded-IPv4 tail without affecting the /64 prefix

assertionResults.fullName: rateLimitKey() — IPv6 /64 keying (arch S23) falls back to the literal for an unparseable IPv6 (still bounded, never fail-open)
assertionResults.title: falls back to the literal for an unparseable IPv6 (still bounded, never fail-open)

assertionResults.fullName: checkRateLimit() returns ok:true when limit allows the request
assertionResults.title: returns ok:true when limit allows the request

assertionResults.fullName: checkRateLimit() returns ok:false when rate limit is exceeded
assertionResults.title: returns ok:false when rate limit is exceeded

assertionResults.fullName: checkRateLimit() shared bucket: same identifier used for requests from the same IP
assertionResults.title: shared bucket: same identifier used for requests from the same IP

assertionResults.fullName: checkRateLimit() IPv6 clients are keyed on the /64 prefix, not the full /128
assertionResults.title: IPv6 clients are keyed on the /64 prefix, not the full /128

assertionResults.fullName: checkRateLimit() uses a singleton Ratelimit instance across calls (shared bucket property)
assertionResults.title: uses a singleton Ratelimit instance across calls (shared bucket property)
